name: Novosibirsk (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the silver Ob River and the Siberian winter
the Siberian taiga and the agriculture of the region
the Ob River, on whose banks the city stands
the silhouette of the railway bridge over the Ob

description: A horizontally divided white-and-green field with a blue wavy stripe across the centre representing the Ob River, charged centrally with a black silhouette of the rail bridge that gave rise to the city.
history: Novosibirsk is the largest city in Siberia and the third-largest in Russia, founded in 1893 around the Trans-Siberian Railway bridge across the Ob. The city flag, adopted on 25 July 2003, depicts the bridge and river that defined the city's origins.

features.symbolism: the bridge whose construction founded the city in 1893
